name: Holiday appointment request
description: Patient tries to book an appointment on a public holiday when the office should be closed.
goal: Schedule a checkup on New Year's Day; if unavailable, shift to the next available weekday.
behavior: Insist on New Year's Day initially
If not possible, agree to the first available slot after the holiday
success_criteria: Agent must not confirm an appointment on New Year's Day
Agent should explain the office is closed on public holidays
Agent should provide the next available date for an appointment
orchestrator_hint: Patient attempts to schedule an appointment on a public holiday.
